answer: Apify is a self-serve platform for web scraping and automation that provides a permanent free tier [1][2][3]. This tier requires no credit card and includes $5 in monthly platform credits that reset each billing cycle and do not roll over [4][2]. When credits are exhausted, the platform blocks further service usage until the next cycle [1][2]. Developers get full access to the Apify API and Store, though free tier proxy usage is limited to the platform [1][2][5]. Paid tiers start at $29/month and include higher resource limits and priority support [1][4].
